payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All right, so you keep hunched low, slowly (stone grinding noise) dragging these stone obelisks of individuals across the jagged floor. You seemingly do so without any of the duergars' eyes catching you through the low light of the cavern. Partially due to the fact that you guys are doing a pretty decent job and partially the fact they're more obsessed that the central piece of their fortress right now is essentially about to be completely filled with molten rock. About 20, 25 minutes or so, you manage to pull just past where the lava flow dips down into what looks like a small opening in the flooring, and you are past the immediate heat of the magma river. You are now pressed up against the wall of the cavern as it begins to twist around and head downward, further deeper into this subterranean mountainous space. You're all beaten, you're all sore, and currently, what do you want to do?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So that's Trinket.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Plus ten.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: But we all add plus ten?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Correct. To the final roll.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I have a question. If I have advantage for other reasons-- I have a cloak of elvenkind which gives me advantage-- does the advantage and disadvantage cancel out into one?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They do. Your foot being wounded, though, is a disadvantage right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So that then goes back down to disadvantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Can't win with this guy.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Just for this circumstance, unfortunately. You're dragging a statue with a partially melted foot right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Liam, it doesn't matter.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You still have plus ten to the roll because Pass Without a Trace.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Plus the ten?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's including the ten.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: 20. That's my low roll.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's 20 for Trinket and 29 for me.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: As she's glancing at that, you make your way about ten minutes away from the area where the rest of the group is currently gathered, keeping a very very close eye on the topography of the wall of the cavern as it slowly curves around and further in that direction. You do manage to find portions of the wall that jut out and leave these small pockets. They themselves might not be super safe for a long period of time, but they give you a little bit of--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I can make another Hallucinatory Terrain. I can do that still.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, maybe you can make it--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can I make it to where it just looks like a wall?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: How long does it last?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I think Hallucinatory Terrain lasts an hour, if I think about it. Books, books, where's my book?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can I look around and and see if there's anywhere that looks like we could hide, tuck in between rocks or something where we wouldn't be visible?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Please.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go ahead and make a perception.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh wait, I get an advantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Because you are in the Underdark, correct.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It lasts for 24 hours.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: 24 hours!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Put a lava flow in front of us.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: But you have to be concentrating the whole time. And you can't. You can't go to sleep.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Six to eight hours is the general long rest period that I would allow for that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Did I?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You did.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I can use my Hunter's Mark to track her!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You can? (all cheer)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: How long does it last and how does it work?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: But that was just 30 minutes ago.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I know, but we all have to rest.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It maintains for up to eight hours!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Eight hours, but we have to rest!

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Because we need to heal. I am pretty low.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm at two.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: You're at two?!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Theory? Proposition? Proposal. What if we use your Hunter's Mark, figure out where she is, get there, camp out nearby, tackle it in the morning?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can I use my Hunter's Mark to find out where she is and then we rest and go there?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can attempt that.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: What if we took a short rest?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Wait, wait, wait. Let's just find out where she is first.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: What if we just took a seven-hour nap? (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Because that's all really anyone sleeps anyway.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I think six hours is about what it takes.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: A solid six hours you'd probably be able to, since you guys are in a hidden area you'll feel more comfortable, depending on how you set your bedding here you could probably do it in six hours.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Well, I am not talking about right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Could we put invisibility on her?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: If we do some sort of flanking thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Well that does sound useful.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It is. It is going to be useful.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I am wondering if we can make a tunnel, though. I can theoretically-- okay, theoretically we could rest and I could keep all of my spells and use all of my magical focus to tunnel us out, depending on how far we are going. We can do an underground approach

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: But concretely, right now we need nappies.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Let's sleep.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: But what if they leave while we sleep?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: But we are essentially powerless.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: And what are we going to do if we find them?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to only sleep for a little bit, cause I didn't use all my spells I only need to rest for half the amount of time, maybe.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It doesn't work that way. (all laugh)

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Once a day, you might want to attempt this and eventually he probably will recover. But not immediately.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 27. Go ahead and make a medicine check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Is this what I can maybe assist her with?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It looks really disgusting by the way. It's so gross.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: What do I roll? Do I roll the 20?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Roll a d20, and add your proficiency modifier

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Can I apply my Luck feat to her?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You don't have any feet left. (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Feet pun!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 21. As you finish the spell, you can see where the mostly-gone second small toe has grown to mostly a full toe, and there's a small stub where the little one is.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You've got a toe nubbin.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Hey man, we got a little stub. A little bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're promoting a level of divine regeneration at a very, very slow pace. You've never attempted this before, and there is some progress, but this may be an over time thing you have to do.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Over time, I just keep doing it?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: She chuckles a moment and says, "All right. Allura is a good friend. Well we've known each other for... gods, 15 years now. Since we defeated the Scourged Rider, together. But she has always had more of a political mind than I do, so, when we were both offered a seat on the council of Tal'Dorei and Emon she stayed, and I... I'm a woman of action, and I knew my destiny was out in the world."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm concentrating so hard. (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We're busted up.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: There's legitimately nothing to be done.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There's a softness that hits Kima's face and you can see a bit of a quiver to her chin and she goes, "The guilt I feel for unknowingly putting you all in danger for my sake is immense. It's because of me and my actions that you even delved this far and nearly lost life and limb, merely at the behest of Allura and... I want you all to know that I appreciate it. I really, truly do."

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: That's great. If you can mention that to Allura, that'd be wonderful.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I would really appreciate it to speak to Tiberius."

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: (mumbles, makes spell sounds, returns to normal voice) I would really appreciate it if you mentioned that to Allura. I'm trying to get into her good graces and whatnot.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "I was speak to Allura of your honor and deeds, Tiberius. We try to have drinks and swap stories every few months. She's a good one."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She chuckles a moment and says, "All right. Allura is a good friend. Well we've known each other for... gods, 15 years now. Since we defeated the Scourged Rider, together. But she has always had more of a political mind than I do, so, when we were both offered a seat on the council of Tal'Dorei and Emon she stayed, and I... I'm a woman of action, and I knew my destiny was out in the world."

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: We share something in common, Lady Kima. I, too, have left my home and land because I did not want to sit on the council of Draconia. With blessings from my father and such, I gained ambassadorship on a mission for them, but really, just so I could--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Her eyes have glazed over and are staring off into the distance. (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: To get all the things out, and I saw this wonderful lamb in this field one time--

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Good. The cruel king is down, and I thank you for that." She walks back to the little perch on the rock at the side of the wall and says, "He tried to break me. Relish in his false superiority. Dragging hooks across my flesh, underestimating the will of a servant of Bahamut."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Her eyes have glazed over and are staring off into the distance. (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: To get all the things out, and I saw this wonderful lamb in this field one time--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I was speak to Allura of your honor and deeds, Tiberius. We try to have drinks and swap stories every few months. She's a good one."

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Yes, I think so.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She takes a moment to herself and looks around at the rest of you and says, "The cruel king. Who dealt the final blow?"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (clears throat) That would be the kingslayer. Me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She steps up and walks over to you and puts a hand on your shoulder and gives you a stern look in the eye and shakes your shoulder. She's a halfling, so she's not too much taller than you. (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (laughing) Oh, okay.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: She puts a hand up towards you. "Child, let me explain to you why we are here. As while you may have stepped into the pretense of keeping me out of harm's way, there is a purpose that I and now all of us serve, here in the Underdark. Now, I've been on this journey for more than a year, traveling wherever the wind took me, finding where my gift would find an end to suffering, justice to the wicked and comfort to the downtrodden. I'd just returned from the frozen tundra northeast of these Cliffkeep mountains, heading to meet with Allura, the same friend who brought you here."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How do you feel now? (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "They tried all they could to break me, but I knew my destiny would not end here. I have a destiny that does not end here."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I reach out really slowly and give her a handkerchief. (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: And then retreat.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Lady Kima, as I'm sure you know, grief speaks before sense.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: All I'm saying, Lady Kima, is that after what we have done and what we have been through and the lives and the blood that even I have on my hands, you had better be worth it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Let us wait for talk of worth and talk of might until we are reunited.

payload.raw_text: I know. So moving around your head slowly. All right, so the rest of you gather, you cast your spell Pass Without a Trace. You continue to crest along the outskirts of the cavern wall at this point. Looking over, you can see, throughout the night, most of the fortress, currently-- the lava fall that once contained it is completely cooled and is dark. It looks like their way of stopping the flow was to stop the entire magma fall. Who knows how much damage has been done, but currently the flow is halted and you can see now, there's a number of parties of duergar that are wandering out, through the cavern, presumably in search for you.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns_last5.text: I take out my Ioun Stones.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: Okay, so your Ioun Stones are now slowly rotating around your head. Well, you can only have one up at a time.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: Yeah, okay, good. You said stones, so.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Essentially, as opposed to having this minutiae of reminding you all to eat, I just consider when you rest and take short rests, you're snacking and resting. Otherwise, we communally spend ten minutes a game talking about what you ate. If food begins to become scarce, which it may in time, I'll let you know.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We should go look for Grog.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Besides, I highly doubt that that stronghold has been left alone, just because it's filled with rock."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Maybe on the way out.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so as you guys progress on the side, I would like everybody to roll a stealth check, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I don't know which one to roll.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You still have disadvantage, but you have advantage with your cloak, so you're neutralized. You're a normal roll right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (softly) Stealth check.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: We have advantage?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You have plus ten.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, you have disadvantage still.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I do not. There's no plus anything?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Plus ten.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Ten still?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Plus ten?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Plus ten.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I didn't roll for Trinket. Hold on.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, Trinket rolled a one.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Trinket, shush. Oh, I didn't feed him today, he's probably so hungry.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Have any of us eaten?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: We've rested.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Keeping your eyes peeled, you travel for another two and a half hours down this cavern path. It grows tighter at points where you can only really fit three or four individuals through, it's about 20, 25 feet wide, then opens up sporadically into other small pockets, where the natural topography of this portion of this Underdark cavern structure seems to weave and bend. The warmth and that sulfurous smell that was intrinsic to the duergar portion of this cavern that you were so used to, begins to slowly fade and temperature begins to drop. Still uncomfortable, but it's growing more humid as opposed to dry heat.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Two grooves?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: About two-inch-wide grooves that continue down the path.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I wonder if they have him prisoner now. If he came out of his mind funk.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wheel tracks?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It could very well be wheel tracks.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Or they're dragging his body.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They're consistent and their width is consistent.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Their width is consistent? And they seem clean?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: They've put him on some sort of stretcher thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, sounds like they have him on, yeah, a trailer.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Lovely. Well, Grog definitely came this way. As did the stitch monster, so you don't have much choice but to follow.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Let's continue.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Shall we?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Be aware. We're all very aware of--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Things.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Any movement at all... happening.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Guys, stuff.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay, all right, so you all stand on the platform. It (straining noises) rises up, and it's one of those all of you have to gather yourself, but nevertheless it is now floating. How long does it last, concentration wise?

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: A thousand.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I did all the math. (clears throat) Vax weighs 155, Pike weighs 75. Taliesin weighs 190, Vex weighs 120.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: But Scanlan weighs nothing.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Sam weighs the same, 75. Keyleth weighs 125.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yep. Kima weighs 105. With all of her armor, she'd be 105.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Clarota can float.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Clarota can float. Does that still fall under a thousand total?

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, should. Is that right?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What about you?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Plus the rock.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: The rock would be less.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: That's why I kept a hundred pounds for that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: A hundred pounds for the rock.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Want to run those numbers again for the calculator?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Rock's 100 pounds? That's not a lot of stone.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's a very thin piece of stone.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's a very thin piece of stone. All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Nine. Nope, we're at nine-- we're there. We're at nine-something. You can do all the math, but it's nine-something.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Keyleth's the only one who sees it, though, at this moment?

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Do I see it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys haven't yet. At the moment, you're talking to this dwarf or you're shoving him off the platform.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Can I see it as I'm cruising through? I see him?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We wanted to throw him as far as we could.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes, the twins pull him up and one--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Two, three!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) All right. As you chuck the duergar through the air, the creature who briefly had stopped, and you guys now see its motion stop, and you get a full view of its horrible form. (grunting, panting sounds)

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: As soon as I do that, I cast True Strike. (ftsssh)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, you cast True Strike on yourself?

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: On him!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: On him?

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: What it does is, it allows me to see--keep going, I'll tell you. Go ahead.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so it stops for a second. You guys all get a view of its vision. As it's looking up towards where Keyleth is, suddenly its head (shh) snaps back into focus as the duergar goes swinging through the air. As it does (snarling) it licks its lips and you can see now, where its mouth is, the lips curl back and the jaw splits open slightly with this horrible Predator-like fanged jaw, and the two tentacles that are currently up in the air reach out, grab, and (tshhh) just split it in two. Its torso then divides and sprays it with crimson as it (tongue flicking noise) licks it out of the air. (breathy growling)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (whispering) Go faster. Go faster!

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I'm still going! We're still going. I'm not standing and watching.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Have we passed it yet?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: And the tentacle (whoosh) wraps around her and grapples her in place, and she's currently held in place by its tentacle. She stays where she is. It is now going to attempt to leap away. It brings all of its tentacles to the ground and (whoosh) leaps up into the air.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 17? Nice! Let's see...

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: On the ground, you look up like...

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: No! My big toe! Bah!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Third strike is going to whip around and attempt to grab... roll between both... Okay, it's going to go for Lady Kima. And that's a natural 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: She's a magnet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Even with disadvantage?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, actually, no, technically it would've still been a 15, so it's not a critical, but it still hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That's good.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Unfortunately, without her full armor, her AC is not that crazy. So it's not a critical. That's nice. That brings it to a total of 18 points of damage with an additional six acid damage to Lady Kima.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh. Acid. None of us have gotten hit yet.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay, make an arcana check. You have advantage on this because the Grasping Vine is also helping.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: (maniacal laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Explodes. All across Vax. Who was standing behind it, just (vrushh)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I love it! (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The giant hole now, which is like you can see portions of its lower jaw are still visible, but the entire top of its head is gone. You can see parts of its flesh trying to reach up and re-form, and then starting falling limp as its form begins to quiver and eventually fall apart. The seams all begin to unravel and its entire body begins to fall apart into chunks. Eventually what's left is this elven torso that slinks to its knees (boof), takes a step,takes another step, and then falls onto its back, completely destroyed. The bones begin to reach up and take its body. Trinket is still currently being held aloft.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I see what's going on. I cast Telekinesis (fssh) and start pulling it up.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Between the two of you guys, you manage to, now that it's been released from the bone, as Tiberius (strains) lifts up and the vine grasping, you lift Trinket up onto the wall, and Tiberius you (thud) release Trinket on the top of the wall.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Grab onto the vine!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's scared of her.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: It's scared of me. Yeah, that's right!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Get Trinket out, and I'll pull Pike up.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, I pull the bear out.
